title: achyrocline celosioides
intro: Achyrocline celosioides, also known as Lava or Hierba Luisa, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and helping to manage stress and anxiety. Achyrocline celosioides can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
